heading: Participation of dairy operations in dairy margin coverage
label: 9054 Participation of dairy operations in dairy margin coverage

children.heading: Eligibility
children.label: a Eligibility
children.text: All dairy operations in the United States shall be eligible to participate in dairy margin coverage to receive dairy margin coverage payments.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall specify the manner and form by which a participating dairy operation may register to participate in dairy margin coverage, including the establishment of a date each calendar year by which a dairy operation shall register for the calendar year.

children.heading: Extension of election period for 2018 calendar year
children.label: 2 Extension of election period for 2018 calendar year

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall extend the election period for the 2018 calendar year by not less than 90 days after , or such additional period as the Secretary determines is necessary for dairy operations to make new elections to participate for that calendar year, including dairy operations that elected to so participate before .February 9, 2018February 9, 2018

children.heading: Retroactive program option
children.label: B Retroactive program option
children.text: In the case of a dairy operation that, by operation of subsection (d) (as in effect on the day before ), was ineligible to participate in the margin protection program for any part of calendar year 2018, the Secretary shall establish a new election period for that calendar year that ends on a date that is not less than 90 days after , and the Secretary determines is necessary for dairy operations to make new elections to participate in the margin protection program (as in effect on the day before ) for that calendar year, including dairy operations that elected to participate in the livestock gross margin for dairy program under the Federal Crop Insurance Act ( et seq.) before .December 20, 2018December 20, 2018December 20, 2018February 9, 20187 U.S.C. 1501

children.label: A
children.text: open the election period not later than 60 days after the effective date described in section 1401(m) of the Agriculture Improvement Act of 2018; and

children.label: B
children.text: hold that election period open for not less than 90 days.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: If a participating dairy operation is operated by more than 1 dairy producer, the dairy producers of the dairy operation who elect to participate shall be treated as a single dairy operation for purposes of participating in dairy margin coverage.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: B Rule of construction
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall not be construed to allow a producer to adjust the proportion of their share covered under tier I or tier II premiums from the proportion covered for the operation.

children.heading: Treatment of producers with multiple dairy operations
children.label: 5 Treatment of producers with multiple dairy operations
children.text: If a dairy producer operates 2 or more dairy operations, each dairy operation of the producer shall separately register to participate in dairy margin coverage.

children.label: A
children.text: pay an administrative fee to register to participate in dairy margin coverage; and

children.label: B
children.text: pay the administrative fee annually through the duration of dairy margin coverage specified in .section 9059 of this title

children.heading: Amount of fee
children.label: 2 Amount of fee
children.text: The administrative fee for a participating dairy operation shall be $100.

children.heading: Use of fees
children.label: 3 Use of fees
children.text: The Secretary shall use administrative fees collected under this subsection to cover administrative costs incurred to carry out dairy margin coverage.

children.heading: Exemption
children.label: 4 Exemption
children.text: A limited resource, beginning, veteran, or socially disadvantaged farmer, as defined by the Secretary, shall be exempt from the administrative fee under this subsection.
